mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward analysis shows positive 20-day returns in >65% of periods when FEDFUNDS increases, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden unemployment rate increase above 4.5% signals labor market deterioration and imminent recession risk, causing investors to sell equities and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of instances when UNRATE crosses above 4.5%, or the signal shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand and construction activity, driving corporate revenue expectations higher and yielding positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in >55% of cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects capacity constraints and slowing real output, which reduces corporate profit margins and triggers negative equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines but SPX forward returns remain positive during tightening periods, or the negative correlation vanishes when FEDFUNDS is rising.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation exceeds 3.0% while the federal funds rate remains below 4.5%, markets price in aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL above 3.0 with FEDFUNDS below 4.5 yields positive 5-day returns in >60% of observations, or the threshold effect disappears in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates expanding economic activity and higher aggregate demand, which supports corporate earnings growth and generates positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth correlates negatively with 60-day forward returns, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where quarterly GDP growth decelerates while monthly retail sales accelerate signals a structural shift toward consumer-driven economic resilience, supporting positive equity valuations.
failure_condition: GDPC1 deceleration alongside RSAFS acceleration yields negative 20-day returns in >60% of cases, or the interaction term fails to improve model fit.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below its 12-month moving average signals supply-side contraction and inventory drawdowns, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative short-term market reactions.
failure_condition: INDPRO below its 12-month moving average coincides with positive 5-day returns in >65% of instances, or the signal shows no edge in walk-forward validation.
